title: AI 机器人实验室正在洽谈融资 10 亿美元，估值达 110 亿美元
summary: Physical Intelligence, a two-year-old robotics startup founded by AI academics and former Google DeepMind researchers, is discussing a new funding round of about $1 billion that would bring the company’s valuation to more than $11 billion including dollars raised, according to people familiar with the matter.（原题：AI Robotics Lab in Talks to Raise $1 Billion at $11 Billion Valuation）
